subject: A shadowed figure in a wide-brimmed hat studies a glowing array of holographic suspect portraits arranged in a circular display at a desk
description: A figure wearing a wide-brimmed hat sits in shadow at what appears to be a desk or console. Their face is not visible — only the hat brim and a hint of dark coat are discernible. Before them hovers a circular arrangement of glowing teal holographic portrait medallions — each showing a different face — with orbiting text in an alien script. The central portrait is the largest and most prominent. The overall scene reads as a detective narrowing a suspect list. The palette is dominated by deep teal-cyan against near-black shadows.
foreground: shadowed figure in wide-brimmed hat before a circular array of glowing suspect portraits
emotion: methodical coldness — elimination one face at a time
